title: Citrusy Potato Tostada Spanaeya
description: A light Spanish dish featuring floury potatoes, lacquer-gilded with a citrusy glaze and served as an egg-free-friendly tortilla española.
instructions: Soak potatoes in water for about an hour.
Drain and thinly slice the potatoes, add to a blender with lemon juice, orange zest, flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a greased 8x8-inch pan and bake for 30 minutes or until set.
Gently pull apart the potato mixture using a fork and form into small balls.
Dip each ball in beaten eggs lightly and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for another 10-15 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm as a dish similar to tortilla española.
